extra.reason: Verified Beads upgrade to stable 1.0.4, embedded Dolt bootstrap from JSONL, hook compatibility updates, and backup/dolt command availability for WPHX-807.
Verified Dolt remote sync, filesystem bd backup sync, fresh clone bootstrap, backup restore, dependency edge match, memory surface match, and ready queue match.
Recorded WPHX-011 license/provenance audit with deterministic manifest, runbook, package-level exceptions, and receipt.
Verified stock Haxe PHP smoke fixture builds with Haxe 4.3.7, runs on local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5, and records generated PHP digests in a committed snapshot.

Verified F1 global function facade fixture: generated Haxe-backed add_filter shell matches PHP oracle ABI, conditional availability, second require safety, and behavior across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F2 reference fixture suite: generated Haxe-backed PHP shell matches oracle for by-reference parameters, by-reference returns, callback reference mutation, and reflection across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F3 native values/global fixture: generated Haxe-backed PHP shell matches oracle for globals, superglobal-shaped state, null/isset semantics, false/zero/empty distinctions, native arrays, and callbacks across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F4 public class fixture: generated Haxe-backed PHP shell matches oracle for global class/interface identity, reflection, inheritance, properties, constants, factory/static behavior, repeated shell load safety, and method behavior across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F5 include/load fixture: generated Haxe-backed original-path shell tree matches PHP oracle for require_once versus include behavior, pluggable conditional declaration, include-time side effects, include return values, normalized paths, ABSPATH guard, and function-scope include mutation across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F6 template/caller-scope fixture: generated Haxe-backed original-path template shells match PHP oracle for admin-style and theme-style mixed output, caller local mutation, object mutation, global state mutation, nested partial include, partial-created caller locals, and include return values across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Verified F7 hook kernel fixture: generated Haxe-backed original-path plugin.php/class-wp-hook.php slice matches copied upstream WordPress oracle for reflected hook API signatures, callback priority ordering, accepted_args, remove_filter, all-hook traces, action traces, reference filter mutation, current_filter/doing_filter stack behavior, and native hook globals across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Accepted ADR-001 for PHP emission architecture: proceed with ordinary Haxe implementation plus target-specific APIs and typed macro manifests feeding a deterministic original-path ABI/file linker; no Haxe PHP backend fork is required by F1-F7 evidence, and backend work remains conditional on a future minimized generic blocker.

Closed PHP target feasibility epic after WPHX-101 through WPHX-109 completed: stock Haxe PHP output, F1-F7 facade/linker fixtures, and ADR-001 together establish the next architecture and fork boundary.

Verified PHP ABI extractor: npm run php:abi:check passes; manifest manifests/php-abi/wordpress-7.0-core-abi.v1.json captures 17,182 ABI entries from 1,855 locked WordPress 7.0 src PHP files with stable hashes and 3 recorded parser recoveries; receipt receipts/php-abi/wphx-201-php-abi-extractor.v1.json.

Verified @:wp.* macro binding validator: npm run wp:macro:bindings:check passes; valid @:wp.class/@:wp.global/@:wp.method/@:wp.constant bindings compile against manifests/php-abi/wordpress-7.0-core-abi.v1.json, while missing, ambiguous, wrong-kind, wrong-arity, and non-static global bindings fail compilation with deterministic WPHX-202 diagnostics. Receipt: receipts/wp-macro/wphx-202-binding-validator.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-203 native WordPress PHP boundary types: npm run wp:boundary:check passes; generated Haxe-backed shell matches PHP oracle for native arrays, globals, callables, by-reference parameters/returns/callbacks, and WP_Error-style native values across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Receipt: receipts/wp-boundary/wphx-203-boundary-types.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-204 deterministic global facade generator: npm run wp:facade:globals:check passes; generated original-name PHP wrappers for add_filter, apply_filters, and _wp_array_set from the WordPress ABI manifest plus typed @:wp.global Haxe bindings; PHP reflection matches ABI projection for defaults, variadics, and by-reference parameters across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Receipt: receipts/wp-facade/wphx-204-global-facades.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-205 original-path shell and file-segment linker: npm run wp:linker:check passes; deterministic linker emits a combined WordPress-shaped generated root from ordered file segments, and include/load plus template/caller-scope fixtures match the PHP oracles across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Receipt: receipts/wp-linker/wphx-205-original-path-linker.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-211 escape hatch audit: npm run haxe:escape-hatches:check passes; tracked Haxe Dynamic/untyped/raw target syntax/cast/Any usages are narrowed or have nearby WPHX-211 justifications, with PHP callable/native value and macro JSON boundaries isolated behind named typedefs. Receipt: receipts/haxe/wphx-211-escape-hatches.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-206 public class/interface/trait emission: npm run wp:public-types:check passes; generated WordPress-shaped shell preserves global and namespaced PHP public type identity, repeated include safety, reflection-visible class/interface/trait contracts, and Haxe-delegated method payloads across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Receipt: receipts/wp-public-types/wphx-206-public-types.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-207 debug/source-map/error-path support: npm run wp:debug:sourcemap:check passes; runtime exception traces map from generated Haxe PHP to fixture Haxe source and from generated original-path shell frames/markers to source:wordpress-7.0.0:src/wp-includes/load.php across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Receipt: receipts/wp-debug/wphx-207-source-map-traces.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-208 PHP compiler conformance CI: npm run ci:php-conformance:check passes; .github/workflows/php-conformance.yml defines a GitHub Actions matrix for compiler/runtime-sensitive path changes, restores the pinned WordPress 7.0 oracle checkout, warms pinned PHP 8.4/8.5 Docker images, and runs the PHP smoke/facade, ABI/macro, boundary/facade/linker/public-type/debug source-map suites. Receipt: receipts/ci/wphx-208-php-conformance-ci.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-210 build profiles: npm run build:profiles:check and npm run ci:php-conformance:check pass; profiles/wp70-build-profiles.v1.json defines deterministic wp70-debug, wp70-parity, and wp70-release contracts with original-path linker policy preserved and intentional differences recorded. Receipt: receipts/build-profiles/wphx-210-build-profiles.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-200 PHP ABI/runtime/linker epic: WPHX-201 through WPHX-208, WPHX-210, and the WPHX-211 escape-hatch hardening child are closed. No WPHX-209 compiler-fork blocker is currently required; ADR-001 remains macros/linker-first.

Verified WPHX-800 Codex + Beads operations epic: WPHX-016 and WPHX-801 through WPHX-807 are closed, covering Beads versioning, agent instructions, deterministic seeding, task packets, receipt links, multi-agent handoff, Dolt sync, backup, and restore drill.

Verified WPHX-301 bootstrap trace scaffold: npm run wp:bootstrap:trace:check passes; normal, SHORTINIT, install, and recovery scenario gates from the typed Haxe fixture match the locked WordPress 7.0 oracle markers, with ordered include/load phase digests recorded for wp-load.php/wp-settings.php and scaffolded ownership captured in manifests/ownership/wphx-301-bootstrap-workset.v1.json. Receipt: receipts/wp-bootstrap/wphx-301-bootstrap-traces.v1.json.

Verified WPHX-302 hooks/plugin API surface: npm run wp:hooks:surface:check passes with 56/56 ABI symbols covered for plugin.php and class-wp-hook.php; generated hook shell and copied WordPress 7.0 oracle match for deprecated hooks, ref-array actions, remove-all helpers, plugin path helpers, activation/deactivation hooks, and uninstall hook registration across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Ownership is recorded as a bounded temporary bridge in manifests/ownership/wphx-302-hooks-workset.v1.json, with WPHX-303 opened to promote the hook bridge toward a Haxe parity candidate. Receipt: receipts/wp-hooks/wphx-302-hook-surface.v1.json.

Implemented WPHX-303 as a typed Haxe hook decision-model parity candidate. Added fixtures/wp-hooks HookCandidateKernel with no new Dynamic/untyped/cast/php.Syntax.code usage, plus npm run wp:hooks:parity-candidate comparing priority ordering/removal, stack/current filter checks, counters, dispatch arity/value-write decisions, default action args, and plugin basename/lifecycle hook names against vanilla WordPress 7.0 across local PHP and pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. WPHX-302 hook surface still passes with 56/56 symbols; WPHX-302 bridge removal now points at WPHX-304 for idiomatic public shell replacement.

Implemented WPHX-304 as the typed Haxe hook runtime-boundary slice. Added src/wphx/wp/hooks/HookRuntime.hx and exposed it through the F7 HookKernel facade; generated plugin.php/class-wp-hook.php now delegate priority normalization, counter increments, dispatch arity, filter/action value-write decisions, default action args, plugin basename trimming, lifecycle hook names, and plugin realpath decisions to typed Haxe while keeping PHP-native callbacks, references, globals, reflection-visible declarations, and include timing intact. Verified npm run php:facade:f7:check, wp:hooks:surface:check, wp:hooks:parity-candidate:check, wp:hooks:runtime-boundary:check, ci:php-conformance:check, and haxe:escape-hatches:check. WPHX-305 owns moving the remaining public shell emission out of the JS PHP template into Haxe/compiler-owned output.

WPHX-305 replaced the broad JS-authored hook public shell template with a source-transform emitter over the locked WordPress plugin.php/class-wp-hook.php oracles, added the shell-emitter gate and CI coverage, and verified WPHX-302/303/304/305 hook checks plus PHP conformance.

WPHX-306 promoted the hook/plugin API workset to verified_haxe_owned. Added the distribution-surface gate, moved WPHX-302 through WPHX-305 ownership manifests out of temporary bridge/parity state, recorded generated plugin.php/class-wp-hook.php provenance and source maps, approved PHP-native callback/reference/global/reflection/include boundaries as public ABI, and verified WPHX-302 through WPHX-306 plus CI conformance.

Reclassified hook-hardening work under WPHX-302.01 through WPHX-302.04, restored real PRD WPHX-303 as the error/deprecation/formatting/escaping/KSES domain task, updated dotted-ref validators and seed ordering, regenerated hook evidence, and passed hook, Beads, inventory, PHP conformance, Haxe formatting, and escape-hatch gates.

Generated the WPHX-303.01 domain surface manifest, external-oracle ownership record, and receipt from WordPress 7.0 source/test/ABI inventories; identified 200 public symbols, 75 upstream tests, first fixture targets, deferred cross-domain units, and filed WPHX-303.02 through WPHX-303.06 follow-up slices.

Built the WPHX-303.02 escaping/sanitization differential harness. It mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 source into oracle and candidate roots, covers 16 escaping/sanitization symbols with 20 seed cases, compares local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5 runtimes, and records native option/cache/filter/KSES boundaries plus remaining Haxe-candidate and full-phpunit gaps.

Promoted zeroise, sanitize_key, sanitize_hex_color, and sanitize_hex_color_no_hash into typed Haxe parity candidates. The generated candidate keeps WordPress global PHP function signatures, preserves the sanitize_key apply_filters native boundary, compares 25 formatting/escaping cases against the WordPress 7.0 oracle on local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5, records haxe_parity_candidate ownership, and documents wp_basename plus distribution-surface gaps for WPHX-303 follow-up.

Built the WP_Error parity candidate harness and typed Haxe runtime helper. The generated candidate keeps the WP_Error PHP class, public errors/error_data arrays, protected additional_data, AllowDynamicProperties, method signatures, wp_error_added action dispatch, and native is_wp_error() boundary; 13 fixture cases cover constructor behavior, add/remove ordering, data history, public property mutation, merge/export, reflection shape, and is_wp_error action behavior across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5.

Built the deprecation/native error signaling differential harness. The fixture mirrors WordPress 7.0 oracle and candidate source trees, covers wp_trigger_error warning/notice/deprecation/WP_Exception paths, suppression filters, deprecated_function/deprecated_argument/_doing_it_wrong hooks and native emissions, WP_Error wp_die input processing, default/Ajax/JSON wp_die handler selection, and direct default/json/ajax/scalar handler output across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Ownership remains external_oracle with PHP-native trigger_error, WP_Exception, hook/filter, header/output, and die/exit boundaries recorded.

Added WPHX-303.05 KSES oracle/candidate fixture harness covering allow-list contexts, protocol stripping, entity normalization, attribute parsing, CSS filtering, and the SimplePie KSES bridge; verified with npm run wp:core:wphx-303-kses and npm run wp:core:wphx-303-kses:check.

Completed WPHX-303 domain slice: surface inventory, escaping/sanitization fixture, WP_Error typed parity candidate, deprecation/native error signaling fixture, KSES fixture, and selected pure formatting Haxe parity candidates all pass local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP runtime checks. Recorded external-oracle and haxe_parity_candidate ownership manifests, parent closure receipt, and WPHX-700.01 follow-up for broader KSES security/block/feed integration coverage.

Added WPHX-700.01 KSES security corpus and block/feed integration gate. The gate mirrors WordPress 7.0 oracle/candidate trees, loads the real SimplePie tree and registry, covers generated XSS corpus cases, protocol/entity/attribute/CSS boundaries, parse_blocks/filter_block_content/filter_block_kses block attribute sanitization, and registry-backed WP_SimplePie_Sanitize_KSES behavior across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Verified npm run security:kses-corpus and npm run security:kses-corpus:check.

Generated the WPHX-304.01 options/transients/object-cache surface manifest, external-oracle ownership record, and receipt from WordPress 7.0 source/test/ABI inventories; identified 128 public symbols, 31 upstream tests, seven domain partitions, three deferred cross-domain behaviors, and filed WPHX-304.02 through WPHX-304.07 follow-up slices.

Built the WPHX-304.02 option storage/autoload differential harness. It mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 source into oracle and candidate roots, covers 15 option/autoload symbols with 12 seed traces, compares local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5 runtimes, and records native wpdb test-double, object-cache, plugin hook, KSES escaping, and PHP serialization boundaries plus remaining WPHX-305 and Haxe-candidate gaps.

Built the WPHX-304.03 transient/site-transient/feed-cache differential harness. It mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 source into oracle and candidate roots, covers 15 transient/feed-cache symbols with 12 seed traces, compares local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5 runtimes, and records native option-table wpdb test-double, single-site site-transient, object-cache, plugin hook, SimplePie stub, and PHP time boundaries plus WPHX-305, WPHX-304.04, and multisite gaps.
Added object cache runtime/drop-in fixture harness, manifest, ownership record, receipt, and validation scripts.
Added serialization/cache salt/invalidation fixture harness, manifest, ownership record, receipt, and validation scripts.
Closed
Closed

Closed after WPHX-304.01 through WPHX-304.07 completed. Fresh audit passed surface, option-storage, transient, object-cache, serialization/cache, settings/defaults, option-cache candidate, Haxe escape-hatch, Beads graph, and receipt validation checks. Remaining non-closure gaps are now tracked by WPHX-305 (wpdb/database abstraction), WPHX-311 (REST settings/schema), WPHX-317 (multisite/network site-option and site-transient paths), and WPHX-322 (PHP first-party manifest/upstream PHPUnit closure).

Generated deterministic WPHX-305.01 wpdb/database surface inventory, ownership manifest, and receipt. The manifest covers 9 upstream source units, 9 database domains, 171 ABI symbol selections, 20 upstream database/option test links, native mysqli/db-dropin/dead-db boundaries, deferred query-domain consumers, and follow-up fixture slices WPHX-305.02 through WPHX-305.06. Verified npm run wp:core:wphx-305-surface:check and npm run beads:validate.

Built the WPHX-305.02 wpdb prepare/escaping differential fixture harness. It mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 source into oracle and candidate roots, covers 13 prepare/escaping symbols with 14 seed traces, normalizes wpdb placeholder tokens, compares local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5 runtimes, and records mysqli real-escape, placeholder query-filter, doing_it_wrong diagnostics, and PHP by-reference mutation boundaries plus remaining live-MySQL/query-execution gaps.

Built the WPHX-305.03 wpdb query/read-result differential fixture harness. It mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 source into oracle and candidate roots, covers 9 query/result symbols with 10 seed traces, compares local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5 runtimes, and records deterministic query/result and column-metadata test-double boundaries plus the remaining live mysqli_result traversal, charset/collation, and full upstream PHPUnit gaps.

Added wpdb write/process-field oracle fixture harness covering insert/replace/update/delete SQL shape, field format coercion, null handling, charset/length guard errors, strip_invalid_text truncation, and deterministic write-state mutation across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Evidence: manifests/wp-core/wphx-305-04-wpdb-write-fields-fixture.v1.json and receipts/wp-core/wphx-305-04-wpdb-write-fields-fixture.v1.json.

Added wpdb charset/collation and prefix oracle fixture harness covering single-site and multisite bootstrap constants, wp_set_wpdb_vars(), prefix/blog switching, table scope matrices, parse_db_host(), server capability gates, table charset metadata interpretation, column charset/length lookup, and safe-collation checks across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Evidence: manifests/wp-core/wphx-305-05-wpdb-charset-prefix-fixture.v1.json and receipts/wp-core/wphx-305-05-wpdb-charset-prefix-fixture.v1.json.

Implemented WPHX-305.06 schema/option/transient integration fixture harness with manifests, ownership, receipts, package scripts, deterministic checks, and WPHX-305.07 follow-up for live MySQL/MariaDB execution.

Implemented the WPHX-305.07 live MySQL/MariaDB runtime gate. The generator provisions locked mysql-8.4 and mariadb-11.8 containers, runs the WPHX-305.06 schema/option seed cases plus live SQL mode, metadata, permission-error, transaction, and locking checks, compares oracle-source mirror behavior for WordPress 7.0, and emits manifest, ownership, and receipt artifacts. Verified npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db:check, npm run beads:validate, npm run receipts:validate, and npm run precommit before closure. Follow-ups WPHX-305.08 and WPHX-305.09 cover the typed Haxe candidate and PHP DB-client matrix gaps.

Implemented the first typed Haxe live-DB candidate for WPHX-305. The new LiveDbSchema Haxe helper promotes maybe_create_table() and maybe_add_column() branch decisions while preserving WordPress-compatible PHP global function shells and real wpdb SQL execution. The WPHX-305.08 generator runs the inherited live MySQL/MariaDB WPHX-305.07 cases against the Haxe-transformed candidate root, emits manifest/ownership/receipt artifacts, and records follow-ups WPHX-305.09 and WPHX-305.10 for remaining PHP DB-client and broader wpdb/dbDelta ownership gaps. Verified npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db-candidate, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db-candidate:check, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db:check, npm run haxe:escape-hatches:check, npm run beads:validate, and npm run receipts:validate.

Implemented the WPHX-305.10 dbDelta Haxe candidate slice. The new DbDeltaPlanner typed Haxe helper promotes dbDelta query classification, target object extraction, field/index-line classification, and index type/name normalization while preserving WordPress-compatible PHP global function shells and real wpdb SQL execution. The WPHX-305.10 generator runs the inherited live MySQL/MariaDB WPHX-305.07/WPHX-305.08 cases against the Haxe-transformed candidate root, emits manifest/ownership/receipt artifacts, and records WPHX-305.11 for the remaining broader wpdb query/result ownership gap. Verified npm run wp:core:wphx-305-dbdelta-candidate, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-dbdelta-candidate:check, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db-candidate:check, npm run wp:core:wphx-305-live-db:check, npm run beads:validate, and npm run receipts:validate.

Promoted bounded wpdb get_var/get_row/get_results result-selection decisions into typed Haxe with live MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparison and follow-up WPHX-305.12 filed for query execution/state ownership.

Promoted bounded wpdb::query classification/return-state decisions into typed Haxe while preserving native mysqli execution and public PHP wpdb ABI; live MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparisons pass and WPHX-305.13 tracks the remaining native execution boundary.

Implemented WPHX-305.13 native-execution candidate: typed Haxe owns _do_query SAVEQUERIES logging policy, native execution guard, num_queries increment, and reconnect retry decision while preserving WordPress wpdb PHP shape; live MySQL/MariaDB oracle gates and inherited checks pass. Filed WPHX-305.14 for remaining mysqli/result population boundary.

Implemented WPHX-305.14 result-population candidate: typed Haxe owns selected-row population guard, row-count initialization/increment, and selected-row return value while preserving native mysqli_fetch_object row objects and WordPress-compatible wpdb last_result/num_rows public state. Live MySQL/MariaDB oracle gates and inherited WPHX-305 checks pass. Filed WPHX-305.15 for the remaining raw mysqli/resource boundary.

Implemented WPHX-305.15 raw mysqli resource metadata candidate: added typed WpdbRawResource guards/fallbacks, live MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparison with metadata and empty-handle reconnect coverage, manifests/ownership/receipt, npm scripts, and WPHX-305.16 follow-up for actual mysqli query/result/fetch ownership.

Implemented WPHX-305.16 mysqli query/result/fetch boundary candidate. Added typed Haxe WpdbMysqliBoundary decisions, generated/live-checked wpdb candidate shell, compiler-pressure evidence for stock Haxe PHP global mysqli extern lowering, manifests/ownership/receipt, and npm check scripts. Verified with WPHX-305.16 live MySQL/MariaDB candidate/check plus inherited WPHX-305 gates, haxe escape-hatch audit, Haxe format, Beads validation, and receipts validation. Filed WPHX-305.17 for direct typed lowering/row traversal follow-up.

Implemented WPHX-305.17 mysqli row traversal candidate. Added typed Haxe WpdbRowTraversal decisions for fetched-row presence, last_result assignment slot, and row-count advancement; generated the live MySQL/MariaDB row traversal candidate on top of WPHX-305.16; kept mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() isolated in the generated PHP boundary with explicit compiler-pressure evidence for future PHP target/reflaxe work. Verified WPHX-305.17 generate/check, inherited WPHX-305.16 through live DB gates, Haxe format, escape-hatch audit, Beads validation, and receipts validation. Filed WPHX-305.18 for direct global-call lowering strategy.

Selected the WPHX-305.18 wpdb mysqli global-call lowering path. Added a runnable stock Haxe PHP probe showing static externs lower to class-static MysqliFunctions::mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() calls, and leading-backslash native names still produce invalid class-static PHP rather than receiver-less globals. Recorded reference evidence from Reflaxe and sibling custom targets, selected a Reflaxe/custom PHP global-function intrinsic path, kept WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary as the temporary ABI-safe boundary, and filed WPHX-305.19 for the concrete backend proof. Verified the new generator/check, inherited WPHX-305.17 live candidate, Haxe formatting, escape-hatch audit, Beads validation, and receipts validation.

Implemented WPHX-305.19 stock Haxe PHP global-function lowering proof. Added typed MysqliHandle/MysqliResult externs and @:phpGlobal MysqliGlobal extern, plus a kept proof fixture showing generated PHP emits direct \mysqli_query($handle, $query) and \mysqli_fetch_object($result) without class-static calls, Dynamic, untyped, casts, php.Syntax.code, or PHP postprocessing. Recorded WPHX-305.18 correction that custom/Reflaxe is not needed for this specific mysqli global-call gap, kept WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary until live candidate integration, and filed WPHX-305.20 for boundary replacement in the live wpdb candidate. Verified new proof/check, WPHX-305.18 check, WPHX-305.17 live row traversal, Haxe formatting, escape-hatch audit, Beads validation, and receipts validation.

Implemented WPHX-305.20 live wpdb @:phpGlobal mysqli integration. Added typed WpdbMysqliCallGate and WpdbMysqliExecution helpers, plus a WpdbMysqliPhpGlobalCandidate fixture and live DB runner. The generated Haxe PHP emits direct \mysqli_query($handle, $query) and \mysqli_fetch_object($result) through the typed MysqliGlobal @:phpGlobal externs; the WPHX_305_17 generated mysqli boundary is removed from the WPHX-305.20 candidate shell and replaced by \wphx\wp\db\WpdbMysqliExecution::query()/fetchObject() calls. Verified WPHX-305.20 against WordPress 7.0 oracle behavior on locked MySQL 8.4 and MariaDB 11.8 runtimes with 18 fixture cases and 2 matching comparisons, plus WPHX-305.19 lowering proof check, WPHX-305.17 row traversal check, Haxe formatting, escape-hatch audit, Beads validation, and receipts validation. Filed WPHX-305.21 for typed fetched-row object materialization.

Implemented WPHX-305.21 typed wpdb fetched-row materialization. Added WpdbRowMaterialization and RowGlobal typed @:phpGlobal row/stdClass helpers, plus a live row-materialization candidate that keeps WpdbMysqliExecution direct mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() lowering while moving fetched-row object presence, get_var value extraction, get_row ARRAY_A/ARRAY_N materialization, get_results ARRAY_A/ARRAY_N materialization, and OBJECT_K first-field key extraction out of the generated wpdb shell and into generated Haxe PHP helpers. Verified MySQL 8.4 and MariaDB 11.8 oracle comparisons with 18 fixture cases and 2 matching comparisons; WPHX-305.21 generate/check, WPHX-305.20 predecessor check, WPHX-305.19 lowering proof check, Haxe formatting, escape-hatch audit with no new occurrences, baseline validation, Beads validation, and receipts validation. Filed WPHX-305.22 for wpdb drop-in/public-state ownership.

Completed WPHX-305.22 wpdb drop-in/public-state ownership boundary plan. Added a structured php-parser based generator/check for the upstream WordPress 7.0 wpdb public property, magic accessor, dynamic property, require_wp_db(), db.php replacement, and wp_set_wpdb_vars() contracts. Recorded the selected next slice as a typed WpdbPublicStateDescriptor plus PHP shell/reflection/drop-in proof, preserving the PHP-visible wpdb ABI before moving public mutable state storage. Verified WPHX-305.22 generate/check, WPHX-305.21 row materialization live gate, WPHX-305.20 mysqli @:phpGlobal live gate, Haxe formatting, escape-hatch audit, baseline validation, Beads validation, and receipts validation. Filed WPHX-305.23 for the typed descriptor shell proof.

Implemented WPHX-305.23 typed wpdb public-state descriptor shell proof. Added WpdbPublicStateDescriptor with typed Haxe inventories and policy helpers for declared public properties, magic-visible internal properties, public magic accessors, protected __set write-block properties, dynamic property preservation, db.php replacement preservation, and field_types direct mutation. Added a candidate runner that compiles the descriptor to PHP, compares generated descriptor output against WordPress 7.0 ReflectionClass('wpdb'), probes constructor-free wpdb::__set behavior for protected write-block names, and verifies require_wp_db() preserves a wp-content/db.php supplied global  without invoking the default constructor. Verified WPHX-305.23 generate/check, WPHX-305.21 row materialization live gate, WPHX-305.20 mysqli @:phpGlobal live gate, Haxe formatting for new files, escape-hatch audit, baseline validation, and Beads validation. Filed WPHX-305.24 for the public-state storage adapter proof.

Implemented WPHX-305.23 typed wpdb public-state descriptor shell proof. Added WpdbPublicStateDescriptor with typed Haxe inventories and policy helpers for declared public properties, magic-visible internal properties, public magic accessors, protected __set write-block properties, dynamic property preservation, db.php replacement preservation, and field_types direct mutation. Added a candidate runner that compiles the descriptor to PHP, compares generated descriptor output against WordPress 7.0 ReflectionClass("wpdb"), probes constructor-free wpdb::__set behavior for protected write-block names, and verifies require_wp_db() preserves a wp-content/db.php supplied global $wpdb without invoking the default constructor. Verified WPHX-305.23 generate/check, WPHX-305.21 row materialization live gate, WPHX-305.20 mysqli @:phpGlobal live gate, Haxe formatting for new files, escape-hatch audit, baseline validation, and Beads validation. Filed WPHX-305.24 for the public-state storage adapter proof.

Implemented WPHX-305.24 typed wpdb public-state storage adapter shell proof. Added WpdbPublicStateStorageAdapter with typed Haxe default-kind/default-value and write-routing helpers for a selected public state subset, selected magic-visible internals, dynamic plugin properties, protected __set write blocks, field_types direct mutation, and db.php replacement preservation. Added a PHP ABI shell probe that initializes selected public defaults from Haxe, routes selected magic-visible writes through adapter-backed shell storage, keeps direct public writes and dynamic plugin fields PHP-visible, and compares snapshots against a constructor-free WordPress 7.0 wpdb oracle. Added a db.php drop-in probe that supplies an adapter-backed global $wpdb and verifies require_wp_db() preserves it. Verified WPHX-305.24 generate/check, WPHX-305.23 descriptor check, WPHX-305.21 row materialization live gate, WPHX-305.20 mysqli @:phpGlobal live gate, direct Haxe formatting for new files, baseline validation, and Beads validation. Filed WPHX-305.25 for broader storage adapter coverage.

Implemented WPHX-305.25 expanded wpdb public-state storage adapter proof: typed Haxe policy covers all 46 declared public defaults/writes, 15 eager magic-visible internals, one lazy col_info boundary, native array/resource boundary strategy, dynamic plugin properties, protected __set blocks, reflection shape, and db.php replacement while keeping WPHX-305.24/23/21/20 gates green.

Implemented WPHX-305.26 class-shell/resource strategy proof: typed Haxe owns the wpdb PHP ABI subclass shell policy, parent-visible native mysqli resource slot routing, lazy col_info parent-loader routing, plugin ABI contract, and require_wp_db()/db.php route while live MySQL/MariaDB probes preserve constructor side effects, actual mysqli_result behavior, dynamic plugin properties, reflection shape, protected magic write blocks, and drop-in replacement. WPHX-305.25/24/23/21/20 gates stayed green.
Verified: npm run wp:core:wphx-305-method-body-strategy-candidate:check plus WPHX-305.26, .25, .24, .23, .21, and .20 predecessor checks passed; manifest/ownership/receipt generated for WPHX-305.27.

Verified: npm run wp:core:wphx-305-query-execution-strategy-candidate:check plus WPHX-305.27, .26, .25, .24, .23, .21, and .20 predecessor checks passed; manifest/ownership/receipt generated for WPHX-305.28.

Implemented WPHX-305.29 db_connect strategy candidate. Typed Haxe WpdbDbConnectStrategy now owns db_connect() construction decision routes for DB_HOST parse handoff, mysqli_init/real_connect, IPv6/mysqlnd bracketing, connect failure/allow_bail, charset initialization, has_connected/ready, SQL mode, and database selection while the PHP ABI shell preserves idiomatic wpdb/plugin behavior. Live MySQL 8.4 and MariaDB 11.8 probes compare constructor/db_connect success, db_connect(false) failure, parse_db_host, inherited WPHX-305.28 query execution, WPHX-305.27 flush()/get_col_info(), dynamic plugin properties, magic accessors, native mysqli handles/results, and db.php replacement against the WordPress 7.0 oracle. Verified WPHX-305.29 generate/check, WPHX-305.28/.27/.26/.25/.24/.23/.21/.20/.16/.15 predecessor checks, Haxe formatting, and escape-hatch audit. Filed WPHX-305.30 for prepare/escaping method-body ownership.

Captured GPT 5.5 Pro oracle test architecture review in ADR-003. The ADR records behavior parity as the primary authority, adds generated-PHP snapshots as a separate contract lane, defines evidence_class/artifact_scope labels, clarifies bridge-shell versus packaged-distribution scope, and files WPHX-700.02 through WPHX-700.06 for generated-PHP snapshots, process isolation/distribution ABI checks, CI gate expansion, upstream PHPUnit ratchet, and shared runner reports. AGENTS.md now clarifies the external architecture oracle terminology separately from WordPress/Gutenberg behavior oracles.

Added the WPHX-700.02 generated-PHP lowering snapshot lane. The new runner compiles the mysqli @:phpGlobal minimized fixture twice into clean output roots, verifies byte-for-byte determinism, lints generated PHP, compares the selected exact PHP golden, checks a stable AST-normalized contract for direct global mysqli calls, rejects static mysqli lowering patterns, records evidence_class=generated_shape/artifact_scope=minimized_fixture, and emits a receipt-backed manifest. Filed WPHX-700.07 for expanding the lane to references, include/caller scope, conditional declarations, public class shape, and native boundary values.

Added WPHX-700.03 hardening to the WPHX-305.29 db_connect live runner. The runner now executes oracle and candidate in separate PHP processes against separate MySQL/MariaDB schemas, preserves full stdout/stderr/process diagnostics by digest under build/wp-core/wphx-305-29/diagnostics, records evidence_class=live_integration_parity and artifact_scope=linked_candidate, and verifies linked-candidate ABI reflection so owned db_connect/query/flush/get_col_info methods are declared by the candidate shell file rather than inherited upstream wpdb. Added a WPHX-700.03 manifest/receipt and filed WPHX-700.08 for the later packaged_distribution no-fallback gate.

Added required WPHX parity gates to the PHP conformance workflow. CI now has a deterministic WordPress core parity suite for generated-PHP lowering snapshots, WPHX-303 WP_Error, WPHX-304 option/cache candidate, and WPHX-305 mysqli global lowering, plus a live DB parity suite for the WPHX-305 db_connect candidate with isolated oracle/candidate process evidence. The workflow warms pinned MySQL/MariaDB images for the live suite and uploads build/manifests/receipts artifacts. The CI validator now rejects missing parity suites, commands, pinned DB images, or artifact upload, and emits a WPHX-700.04 receipt.

Moved wpdb prepare/placeholder/escaping decision slices into typed Haxe via WpdbPrepareEscapingStrategy and added a WPHX-305.30 PHP ABI subclass candidate. The candidate preserves the WPHX-305.02 prepare/escaping oracle cases across local PHP plus pinned PHP 8.4/8.5 Docker runtimes, keeps Dynamic/untyped/cast/php.Syntax.code out of the Haxe source, preserves WPHX-305.27 method-body and WPHX-305.29 db-connect gates, emits ownership/manifests/receipt, and adds the new deterministic parity gate to CI.
Added packaged-distribution wpdb runtime ABI no-fallback gate with CI wiring and receipts.
Provisioned disposable PHPUnit ratchet environment with Composer-installed roots, isolated MySQL databases, and non-blocked parity execution.
Added upstream PHPUnit ratchet harness, selected group registry, known-deltas ledger, and provisioned execution receipt with pass/pass classifications.
Added shared runner support utilities, deterministic support checker, docs, and adopted them in the upstream PHPUnit ratchet runner.

Expanded generated-PHP lowering snapshots with WPHX-700.07 public-class and native object/array boundary minimized fixtures, exact goldens, AST contracts, compile-twice determinism, PHP lint, and dedicated manifest/receipt evidence.
Completed WPHX-305.09: locked PHP DB-client image inputs, verifier, and live DB matrix integration.

Completed WPHX-305 wpdb/database abstraction workset: surface inventory, deterministic fixtures, live MySQL/MariaDB gates, typed Haxe candidate slices through prepare/query/db_connect/public-state/native mysqli boundaries, locked PHP DB-client runtime matrix, manifests, ownership records, and receipts are in place.

Implemented WPHX-311.01 REST settings-controller differential fixture. The runner mirrors the locked WordPress 7.0 REST/settings/options source into oracle and candidate roots, compares route registration, permission callback, show_in_rest schema emission, get/update/null-error flows, sanitize_callback behavior, deterministic wpdb option storage, and REST schema validation across local PHP plus pinned Docker PHP 8.4/8.5. Added manifest, ownership, receipt, package scripts, and required CI deterministic parity gate. Verified npm run wp:core:wphx-311-rest-settings-controller:check, npm run ci:php-conformance:check, npm run beads:validate, and npm run receipts:validate.
Added REST settings server-dispatch fixture with oracle/candidate parity, receipts, ownership manifest, and required CI gate.
Added typed Haxe REST settings schema strategy candidate with oracle/candidate parity, CI gate, receipts, and explicit remaining REST boundaries.
Added typed Haxe REST settings value strategy candidate for get_item/prepare_value with oracle parity, CI gate, receipts, and explicit update_item follow-up gap.
Added typed Haxe REST settings update_item strategy candidate with normal update, missing-param skip, pre-update short-circuit, null delete, invalid stored-value error parity, receipts, and CI gate.

Added typed Haxe REST server dispatch strategy candidate for WP_REST_Server::dispatch and respond_to_request, preserving PHP plugin/filter ABI through a linked candidate shell. Oracle/candidate parity covers the WPHX-311.02 dispatch cases across local PHP and pinned Docker PHP runtimes; WPHX-311.01-.05 checks continue to pass; manifests, ownership, receipts, escape-hatch audit, and CI gate are updated. Filed WPHX-311.07 for packaged distribution and HTTP serving closure.

Added WPHX-311.07 packaged REST server HTTP gate. The runner builds oracle and candidate package roots, compiles the Haxe dispatch strategy into the candidate package, proves WP_REST_Server serve_request/dispatch/respond_to_request are declared from the package class file without upstream class fallback across local PHP and pinned Docker runtimes, and compares CLI-safe serve_request() output/status/header-intent traces for settings success, update, no-route, HEAD, and rest_pre_serve_request manual serving cases. Added manifests, ownership, receipt, package scripts, and required CI gate. Filed WPHX-311.08 for real web-server E2E and upstream REST PHPUnit ratcheting.
Implemented REST web-server E2E gate, upstream REST PHPUnit ratchet group declarations, CI wiring, manifests, receipts, and follow-up WPHX-311.09.
Implemented installed-style index.php REST routing and Playwright/browser fetch parity gate with CI wiring, manifests, receipts, and follow-up WPHX-311.10.
Moved WP_REST_Server::serve_request branch decisions into typed Haxe strategy helpers while preserving PHP-native WordPress side effects in the shell; packaged, web, browser, and dispatch gates pass.

Moved WP_REST_Server::response_to_data and get_compact_response_links branch decisions into typed Haxe helpers while preserving native PHP array/link/embed boundaries; REST package, web, browser, and dispatch gates pass.

Moved WP_REST_Server::get_response_links and get_target_hints_for_link branch decisions into typed Haxe helpers while preserving native PHP link arrays, request parsing, route matching, validation, sanitization, and allow-header boundaries; REST gates pass.

Moved WP_REST_Server::embed_links branch decisions into typed Haxe helpers, added _embed coverage to packaged/web/browser gates, and preserved native PHP request parsing, dispatch, filters, cache, and response recursion boundaries.

Closed REST API/schema domain after attaching WPHX-311.09 through WPHX-311.14 to the parent graph and recording domain closure evidence for settings, server dispatch, typed strategy candidates, packaged HTTP, installed browser, DB-backed browser, and cross-origin CORS/preflight gates.

Added the first ADR-004-aware multisite Haxe semantic/adapter-contract candidate with typed Haxe ownership axes, generated PHP runtime checks across local/Docker PHP, no public PHP shell replacement claim, manifests, ownership manifest, receipt, npm scripts, and progress-matrix update.
Added receipt-backed multisite bootstrap/domain-path routing fixture with oracle/candidate isolated roots, local plus Docker PHP comparisons, check mode, evidence link, and progress matrix update.

Added receipt-backed multisite signup/lifecycle/counts/quota fixture with isolated oracle/candidate roots, activation-key normalization, local plus Docker PHP comparisons, check mode, evidence link, and progress matrix update.

Added WPHX-317 domain closure receipt covering all seven child slices, linked evidence, updated progress matrix, and verified the WPHX-317 check set. Closure is bounded to targeted oracle/candidate fixtures plus the first Haxe multisite adapter-contract candidate; public PHP replacement and installed distribution claims remain later gates.

Added deterministic WPHX-322 first-party PHP manifest closure/split runner and receipt. The manifest assigns 1,564 C1 WordPress 7.0 PHP runtime source entries and 1,222 C1 PHP distribution artifacts to closed receipt-backed domains or explicit WPHX-306 through WPHX-320 follow-up owners, with zero unassigned; PHP vendor entries are excluded to WPHX-323. This is manifest ownership/split closure, not a broad Haxe implementation claim.

Added deterministic WPHX-306.03 capability/role oracle-source mirror fixture and receipt. The fixture covers 9 cases and 21 symbols across WP_Role, WP_Roles, WP_User, map_meta_cap, current_user_can, user_can, role mutations, filters, missing users, super-admin behavior, and site-switch capability context. This is targeted semantic parity evidence for the auth domain; it does not claim generated public PHP replacement or installed auth distribution parity.

Added deterministic WPHX-306.04 auth-cookie/nonce oracle-source mirror fixture and receipt. The fixture covers 9 cases and 11 symbols across wp_generate_auth_cookie, wp_parse_auth_cookie, wp_validate_auth_cookie, wp_set_auth_cookie, wp_clear_auth_cookie, wp_nonce_tick, wp_create_nonce, wp_verify_nonce, wp_hash/wp_salt, session-token lookup, and pluggable declaration timing. It records hook-level cookie intent and CLI header observations; real web-SAPI Set-Cookie parity remains for the installed distribution gate. This does not claim generated public PHP replacement.

Added deterministic WPHX-306.05 password/application-password oracle-source mirror fixture, ownership manifest, receipt, evidence link, npm check scripts, and progress-matrix update. Covers WordPress-prefixed bcrypt, vanilla bcrypt, legacy md5, too-long password behavior, password filters, application-password hashing/checking, app-password auth success/failure, usage recording, and basic-auth validation against separate oracle/candidate PHP source mirrors. This does not claim generated public PHP replacement, runtime ABI closure, or installed login/auth distribution parity.

Added deterministic WPHX-306.06 user/auth runtime ABI fixture, ownership manifest, receipt, evidence link, npm check scripts, and progress-matrix update. The fixture covers WP_User, WP_Roles, WP_Role, WP_User_Query, WP_Session_Tokens, WP_User_Meta_Session_Tokens, and WP_Application_Passwords across reflection declarations, declaring files/classes, class attributes, public/default property order, method signatures, dynamic properties, magic methods, serialization shape, session token storage, and plugin-style object access. Candidate is still an oracle-source mirror; this does not claim generated public PHP replacement or installed login/auth parity.

Added deterministic WPHX-306.07 installed-style auth distribution gate with package roots, PHP HTTP transport, cookie carry-over, package-boundary reflection, ownership manifest, receipt, evidence link, npm scripts, and progress-matrix update. The gate covers login/logout, auth Set-Cookie headers, logged-in profile access, AJAX nonce success/failure, REST-style application-password Basic auth, profile application-password creation, bad-password errors, and Haxe auth contract artifacts in the candidate package. Candidate public auth files remain copied oracle source, so generated public PHP replacement and full MySQL-backed installed WordPress parity are explicitly not claimed.

Closed WPHX-306 users/auth domain with a bounded domain-closure receipt. The domain now has a surface inventory, typed Haxe AuthAdapterContract candidate, capability/role fixture, auth-cookie/nonce fixture, password/application-password fixture, runtime ABI fixture, installed-style HTTP auth gate, evidence links, and progress-matrix update. This is not a generated public PHP replacement claim: public auth files remain oracle-source package fixtures, and full MySQL-backed installed WordPress auth/admin/plugin/upstream-PHPUnit closure remains WPHX-700 or later distribution work.
